codeReview.summary: The worker correctly preserved relevant Known Gotchas from main's CONTRIBUTING.md (section 11) to gem's CONTRIBUTING.md (new section 6). Obsolete gotchas were appropriately removed (CSV format removed in gem, --max-rows now server-side with Early Cursor Closure). Gotcha ⑤ was correctly updated from 'INTO is blocked' to 'Semicolons are blocked' to reflect gem's actual validation approach.

summary: PASS - The Known Gotchas section was successfully added to CONTRIBUTING.md with 6 relevant gotchas preserved from main. Obsolete gotchas (CSV format, --max-rows client-side) were correctly removed. Gotcha ⑤ was accurately updated to reflect gem's semicolon-based SQL injection prevention. The documentation is helpful and accurately describes current behavior.
